name: material-point
description: Pointer-based FISH access to material points — the core MPM carriers of mass, stress and history. Best for scripted stress/strain probes, convergence checks, and validation reports after command-driven setup. MPoint is 3D.

notes: Loop with 'loop foreach' over mpoint.list rather than assuming contiguous IDs.
mpoint.containing(pos) / mpoint.near(pos) locate a point by position.
mpoint.pos is the current material-point position; it moves through the fixed grid.
mpoint.stress / mpoint.strain are the carried tensors; mpoint.pp is pore pressure.
mpoint.prop reads/writes the assigned cmodel's properties; see the 'constitutive-models' reference.
mpoint.force.app is the applied force; mpoint.fix flags fixed velocity components.
Use named groups + slots for stable selection.
The mech.ratio.* intrinsics are the MPM equilibrium-convergence measures.
